description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular metallic head with gold accents and geometric embellishments, giving it a stylized, almost ceremonial appearance. The head is flanked by two large, blocky faces, each bordered with gold bands and adorned with angular, metallic details at the center. The handle is straight, slender, and metallic, with a gold finish and a purple, faceted end cap that adds a touch of color and grip. The overall design is symmetrical, with the head's width being the most prominent dimension, and the handle extending directly downward. The surfaces are smooth and reflective, suggesting a polished metal construction. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments, and the hammer appears pristine and decorative.
description: A stylized hammer with a large, gold-accented metallic head and a straight, gold handle with a purple end cap. The design is geometric, polished, and pristine.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the rectangular head with gold accents and the straight handle extending downward.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the symmetrical, blocky head with central gold and silver geometric details and the full width of the striking faces.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors view 0, again highlighting the rectangular head and gold accents, with the handle visible below.
description_view_3: The rear view is similar to the front, displaying the geometric head and gold embellishments, but with less pronounced central detailing.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle with a gold finish and a faceted purple plastic end cap; smooth and cylindrical with no visible ergonomic enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledge-type head with gold-accented geometric details and two broad striking faces; no claws or peens present.
